summary: SLIVE | Hearing Playback Time Announcement After Pressing Play Following Rewind
description:
GIVEN the user is watching SLIVE content
AND TTS is enabled

steps.action: WHEN the user presses select during Rewind
steps.result:
THEN the user will hear: “Playing/pause, <time_behind_live>, press select to play/pause”
For example: “Pause, 10 minutes 45 seconds behind live, press select to play.”
